allow: Bash(node -e "const {Inngest} = require\(''inngest''\); const i = new Inngest\({id:''test''}\); console.log\(i.createFunction.toString\(\).substring\(0, 200\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const ik = require\(''@imagekit/nodejs''\); console.log\(typeof ik.default, typeof ik.ImageKit\)")

Bash(node -e "const IK = require\(''@imagekit/nodejs''\).default; const ik = new IK\({urlEndpoint:''x'',privateKey:''y''}\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(ik\)\).filter\(m => m !== ''constructor''\).join\('', ''\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const IK = require\(''@imagekit/nodejs''\).default; const ik = new IK\({urlEndpoint:''x'',privateKey:''y''}\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(ik\)\).join\('', ''\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const {Inngest} = require\(''inngest''\); const i = new Inngest\({id:''test''}\); console.log\(Object.keys\(i\).filter\(k => k.includes\(''key''\) || k.includes\(''Key''\) || k.includes\(''event''\)\).join\('', ''\)\)")
